>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/partner/notification/endpoint"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Notify partner about changes in application.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"notificationContent":{"type":"object","properties":{"applicationId":{"type":"string","description":"Primary identifier of the application"},"applicationStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATED","PRESCORED","APPROVED","VERIFICATION","ALTERNATIVE","CONFIRMED","REJECTED","CANCELLED"],"description":"Status of the application"},"orderNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Order number (internal for e-shop)"},"orderStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["IN_PROCESS","TO_SHIP","SHIPPED","CHECKING_DELIVERY","DELIVERED","PAID","CANCELLED","TERMINATED"],"description":"Status of the Order"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (150000 represents 1 500) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Current down payment set by a customer"},"notificationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Time when notification was created (uses [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) formatting)"},"sequenceNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Notification sequence number"}},"required":["applicationId","applicationStatus","notificationDate","sequenceNumber"],"description":"Content of the notification"},"sentDate":{"type":"string","description":"Time when notification was sent (uses [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) formatting)"},"checksum":{"type":"string","description":"Message checksum - result of HMAC with SHA512 (secret key is used)"}},"required":["notificationContent","sentDate","checksum"],"example":{"notificationContent":{"applicationId":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","applicationStatus":"CONFIRMED","orderNumber":"AA234","orderStatus":"TO_SHIP","downPayment":{"value":150000,"currency":"CZK"},"notificationDate":"2020-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","sequenceNumber":1},"sentDate":"2020-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","checksum":"f61c69a259b702d564b2032e554984dec3b713ff7bdde17fcb727d403ea0d730816f46ad2bbc06a1914225d5dfba0396927dbf1b0698081814877b5486950a15"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  responses={{"204":{"description":"No Content","headers":{}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request","headers":{}}}}
